name: Smoked Beef Brisket
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the marinade by combining all ingredients in a covered dish large enough to hold the brisket laying flat.
2. Place the brisket in the refrigerator and marinate, turning every 6 hours for 48 hours.
3. Remove the brisket from the refrigerator 2 hours before smoking and allow it to warm to room temperature.
4. Smoke the brisket in a smoker set at 190-225°F for 6 to 7 hours.
5. Place the marinade in the water pan of the smoker.
